questions.question: What does HTML stand for?
questions.explanation: HTML is the language used to structure web pages.

questions.question: Which tag creates the largest heading?
Which tag is used for a paragraph?
questions.explanation: Paragraph text is written with the p tag.

questions.question: Which tag inserts a line break?
questions.explanation: br creates a single line break in text.

questions.question: Which tag makes text strongly important?
questions.explanation: strong marks text as strongly important.
